title: Consent Window Chip
prompt:
Create a production-ready Consent Window Chip using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original miscellaneous control communicates whether a temporary sharing window is open. Activating the chip toggles between Sharing paused and Sharing open, shifts a small teal window marker, and updates a readable status sentence. It should be a small, useful surface rather than a modal or toast. Use a light Bento composition with white and #F4F5F6 surfaces, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, subtle neutral shadow, #111111 type, and #4A4A4F support copy. Teal is the only bright accent; do not use gradients on the chip or card.

Use one semantic button with aria-pressed, a descriptive accessible name, a polite live region, minimum 44px target, and a visible 3px focus ring. Support normal click, Enter, and Space. Animate the window marker using a spring at stiffness 380 and damping 27, fade the label over 150ms ease-out, and use a 90ms press scale of 0.98. Keep state local and deterministic: no timers, random values, browser storage, remote data, or network requests.

At 320px, prevent the status from clipping and keep the action easy to reach; on a large preview, preserve a compact maximum width rather than expanding excessively. Maintain logical tab order, AA contrast, and text that communicates status without relying on teal. With prefers-reduced-motion, snap the marker and retain only a short opacity transition. Return complete client code, a pure CSS fallback with suggested HTML, and no dependencies beyond React, Tailwind, and Framer Motion.

code.css:
/* HTML: <button class="consent-window" aria-pressed="false">Sharing paused</button> */
.consent-window{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;min-height:48px;max-width:340px;border:0;border-radius:16px;background:#f4f5f6;color:#111;font-weight:800;padding:0 16px}.consent-window::before{width:18px;height:18px;border:4px solid #17a99b;border-radius:50%;content:""}.consent-window[aria-pressed=true]::before{background:#17a99b}.consent-window:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.consent-window *{transition:none}}

demoCode:
(() => {function Demo(){const [open,setOpen]=React.useState(false);return

{open?'Temporary sharing is open.':'Temporary sharing is paused.'}
